svg.style: background: #FFFFFF; background-color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Agentic ERP Architecture" id="0" viewBox="0 -53 1228 841 1"> <mxGraphModel dx="1204" dy="817" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" background="#FFFFFF" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="business-user" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D9EAF7;strokeColor=#486581;fontSize=16;shadow=1;" value="Business User" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="316" y="57" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="agent" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#BCCCDC;strokeColor=#334E68;fontSize=16;shadow=1;" value="AI-powered ERP Agent" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="280" x="266" y="207" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reasoning" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#486581;fontSize=14;shadow=1;" value="Business Reasoning" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="76" y="407" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="actions" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#486581;fontSize=14;shadow=1;" value="Controlled Actions" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="516" y="407" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="data" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;fillColor=#D8F3DC;strokeColor=#40916C;fontSize=15;shadow=1;" value="ERP Data
(PostgreSQL)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="220" x="76" y="617" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="processes" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D8F3DC;strokeColor=#40916C;fontSize=15;shadow=1;" value="ERP Processes" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="220" x="516" y="617" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge1" edge="1" parent="1" source="business-user" style="endArrow=block;strokeColor=#829AB1;strokeWidth=2;" target="agent"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge2" edge="1" parent="1" source="agent" style="endArrow=block;strokeColor=#829AB1;strokeWidth=2;" target="reasoning"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge3" edge="1" parent="1" source="agent" style="endArrow=block;strokeColor=#829AB1;strokeWidth=2;" target="actions"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge4" edge="1" parent="1" source="reasoning" style="endArrow=block;strokeColor=#829AB1;strokeWidth=2;" target="data"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge5" edge="1" parent="1" source="actions" style="endArrow=block;strokeColor=#829AB1;strokeWidth=2;" target="processes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge6" edge="1" parent="1" source="data" style="startArrow=block;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#40916C;strokeWidth=2;" target="processes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
